title: thalictrum simplex subsp. tenuifolium
intro: Thalictrum simplex subsp. tenuifolium, also known as tall meadow rue or meadow rue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in treating skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of thalictrum simplex subsp. tenuifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and prevent infection, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Thalictrum simplex subsp. tenuifolium can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or tea to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
